subcodes.first_line: The fragrances of the verses have been diffused, and the sovereignty of clear proofs hath encompassed all who dwell in the realms. Verily, he who hath attained on this day is among the exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاحت نفحات الایات و احاط سلطان البینات من فی العالمین ان الذی فاز الیوم انه من اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
